description: Style NoteGlam up a simple look with these bejewelled gold sandals from catwalk. Pair them with simple ethnic wear or western wear for the additional dash of bling in your look. Complement these shoes with matching accessories. Product DetailsTapering toe gold sandalBejewelled forefoot strap and mid foot strap which extends from the midfoot to the heel collarHigh heel collar with a zipped closureTwo bejewelled straps looping above the ankleSoft gold footbedTough plastic base with crystal embellishmentsSlim stiletto heels with crystal embellishmentsTextured TPU outsole patch in the forefoot regionMaterial and CareSynthetic Wipe with a clean damp when needed
